advantages: A single Pipeline fit/predict API prevents skipped preprocessing steps between training and serving.
ColumnTransformer keeps numeric and categorical treatment explicit and composable in one object.
Train-only fitting inside Pipeline integrates cleanly with cross-validation and grid search over hyperparameters.
joblib-serialized pipelines version the full transform chain plus model for reproducible deployment.
disadvantages: pandas cleaning outside the pipeline can drift from notebook scripts unless wrapped in transformers.
ColumnTransformer output is a dense numpy matrix—column names are harder to inspect than a raw DataFrame.
Long pipelines are harder to debug when a step fails mid-chain without logging intermediate shapes.
Stateful pandas operations (groupby features) do not fit sklearn defaults and require custom transformers with more engineering.
